meta.title: End-to-End Integration Testing (Grizz - Go)
meta.dependencies: task-2, task-3, task-4, task-5, task-6, task-7

task.role: You are a Go Engineer specializing in APIs and backend services. Implement Task 10 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Create comprehensive integration tests that validate the complete notification flow from submission through delivery across all channels and clients.
context.background: This task is part of AlertHub notification platform. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.md (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: task-2, task-3, task-4, task-5, task-6, task-7

requirements.description: Build Go test suite that creates test notifications, verifies routing through Rex service, confirms delivery via Nova service, validates WebSocket updates reach web clients, checks push notifications on mobile, and ensures desktop notifications display. Include load testing for throughput requirements.

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-10): End-to-End Integration Testing (Grizz - Go)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide

Complete notification flow works end-to-end, all channels deliver test notifications successfully, WebSocket updates reach all connected clients, load tests achieve 10,000 notifications/minute, API response times stay under 100ms p95, and error scenarios are handled gracefully

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
